title: Hypothesis Testing Decision Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step logical process of conducting a hypothesis test in statistical machine learning, from stating hypotheses to making a final inference.
elements: Make Decision (Reject H₀ / Fail to Reject H₀)
relationships: Sequential flow from stating hypotheses through data collection, calculation, decision-making, and final conclusion, with a decision branch based on the comparison of the p-value to alpha.
